reply_original: Wow, I'm so happy you're loving the Lifetime option! It's our special way of saying thank you to our most loyal users. Now you can enjoy your favorite characters forever without any interruptions. We're honored to be part of your journey! If you ever need help, just reach out to support@fantachat.ai. Have fun!
reply_zh: 哇，太开心看到你喜欢终身会员选项了！这是我们向最忠实用户表达感谢的特别方式。现在你可以永久享受你最喜欢的角色，不再有任何中断。我们很荣幸能成为你旅程的一部分！如果你需要任何帮助，请随时联系 support@fantachat.ai。祝你玩得开心！
